final_response: No — we can't open a senior staff rec this quarter. Per the 2026-04-15 decision (status: accepted) in decisions.md, all four Q2 engineering hires are restricted to mid-level (3–7 years of experience). No staff or senior staff recs are open this quarter. The CEO and CTO chose a balanced team with training capacity at mid-level over high-leverage staff-level hires for the next two quarters. The decision explicitly calls out recruiting's path: politely decline senior+ candidates as 'not this round.' Re-evaluation is scheduled for Q3 planning, so that's the next opportunity to revisit scope for this candidate or another. References cited in the entry: Q2 planning notes and the CEO/CTO sync on 2026-04-12.
